steps.title: Follow the movement evidence
steps.content: Around 2,000 years ago, Siberian dogs began interbreeding with Near Eastern breeds, and Near Eastern artifacts appeared at some sites. The people at those sites show no evidence of extensive travel outside Siberia.

steps.title: Keep direction consistent
steps.content: B contradicts the no-travel evidence by sending Siberians to the Near East. C reverses part of the exchange by moving Siberian dogs outward. D reverses the artifacts by making them Siberian in origin. The answer is A.
